Title: Verify user creation
Test Data:
- Id: 1
- Password: password123
- Email: user@example.com
- Nome: John
- Cognome: Doe
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user registration page.
2. Enter the test data.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully created and can log in.

Title: Verify user login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the test data.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in.

Title: Verify user password change
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the account settings page.
2. Click the "Change Password" button.
3. Enter the new password.
4. Confirm the new password.
5. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The user's password is successfully changed.

Title: Verify user email change
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the account settings page.
2. Click the "Change Email" button.
3. Enter the new email.
4. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The user's email is successfully changed.

Title: Verify user name change
Test Data:
- New Nome: Jane
- New Cognome: Smith
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the account settings page.
2. Click the "Change Name" button.
3. Enter the new name.
4. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The user's name is successfully changed.

Title: Verify product creation
Test Data:
- Nome: Product 1
- Luogo: Location 1
- Descrizione: Description 1
- Immagine: Image 1

Expected Result: The product is successfully created and can be viewed by the user.

Title: Verify product details change
Preconditions: User is logged in and the product has been created.
Test Data:
- New Nome: Product 2
- New Luogo: Location 2
- New Descrizione: Description 2
- New Immagine: Image 2
- New Prezzo: 20.00
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product details page.
2. Click the "Edit Product" button.
3. Enter the new product details.
4. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The product's details are successfully changed.

Title: Verify product signaling
Preconditions: User is logged in and the product has been created.
Test Data:
- Tipo: True
- Titolo: Signal 1
- Descrizione: Description of the signal
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product details page.
2. Click the "Signal Product" button.
3. Enter the test data.
4. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The product is successfully signaled, and the user can view their signal.

Title: Verify product signaling by another user
Preconditions: User 1 has created a product and user 2 is logged in.
Test Data:
- Tipo: True
- Titolo: Signal 2
- Descrizione: Description of the signal
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product details page (created by user 1).
2. Click the "Signal Product" button.
3. Enter the test data.
4. Click the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: The product is successfully signaled by user 2, and user 1 can view the signal.

Title: Verify product signaling type
Preconditions: User is logged in and the product has been signaled.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product details page.
2. Click the "Edit Signal" button.
3. Change the signal type to false.
4. Click the "Save" button.
Expected Result: The product's signal is successfully changed to false.

Title: Verify product signaling removal
Preconditions: User is logged in and the product has been signaled.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the product details page.
2. Click the "Remove Signal" button.
3. Confirm the removal.
Expected Result: The product's signal is successfully removed.
